sections.paragraph:
θήρ, ός, ὁ (Hom. et al.; Sb 4011, 4; LXX; ViDa 7 [p. 77, 13 Sch.]; Ath., R. 56, 20) (wild) animal 1 Cl 20:4. θῆρες ἄγριοι wild animals 56:12 (Job 5:23).—Schmidt, Syn. II 432–36. DELG.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Sch. Sch. = TSchermann, Prophetarum vitae fabulosae—List 5

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Schmidt, Syn. Schmidt, Syn. = JS., Synonymik—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 455
